  • Constructor Details

    • CorePrettyPrintUtils

  • Method Details

    • getDirectOrImplicitChildString

      public static String getDirectOrImplicitChildString(IEvent event, IInternalElement child, String directChildId, String implicitChildId)
      Returns the string directChildId if a given event child element is direct, or the string implicitChildId if the given event child element is implicit (i.e. is owned by a more abstract event). The string is typically HTML code with specific CSS style built before calling this method.
      Parameters:
      event - the event that is currently treated
      child - the element that is tested
      directChildId - the string that corresponds to the element, if the element is direct child of the event given as parameter
      implicitChildId - the string that corresponds to the element, if the element is implicit for the event given as parameter
      Returns:
      the implicit string if the element is an implicit child of the event given as parameter, the direct string if the element is direct child of the event given as parameter

    • getPrettyPrinter

      public static IElementPrettyPrinter getPrettyPrinter(IInternalElement e)
      Returns the pretty printer for a given internal element or null if there is no pretty printer defined by the element's contribution.
      Parameters:
      e - the element for which we want the pretty printer
      Returns:
      the pretty printer or null if any

    • isTheorem

      public static boolean isTheorem(IDerivedPredicateElement elem)
